login.title: Login to Omnidask
login.description: Use your workspace credentials to access the dashboard.
login.errorFallback: Unable to login. Please try again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address

register.title: Create your Omnidask account
register.description: Set up your owner account and first workspace.
register.errorFallback: Unable to create account. Please try again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password: Password must have at least 12 characters
validation.workspaceSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

dashboard.description: Your protected Omnidask dashboard is ready.
dashboard.authenticatedDescription: This screen is only available after the login flow stores a valid session.
